title: Chapter 18: Orange Town Under Buggy’s Shadow
main_description: Luffy battles Buggy directly, and Nami’s role becomes crucial as Buggy’s weaknesses and arrogance are exposed.
key_events: Buggy’s crew continues to threaten Orange Town.
Luffy, Zoro, and Nami resist Buggy’s pirates in different ways.
The town’s fear and personal losses make the battle more than a simple pirate clash.
